trajectory.description: Observation: Starting fresh with no code. Analysis: Need to build a complete pipeline for CIFAR-100 with ~40% noisy labels. Key strategies: (1) Use pretrained CLIP ViT-B/16 for strong features, (2) Start with simple cross-entropy to get baseline, (3) Later add noise-robust techniques. Decision: Build all files, train 5 epochs quickly, submit eval to measure time.

trajectory.command: EPOCHS=20 BATCH_SIZE=128 LR=2e-4 HEAD_LR=1e-3 LABEL_SMOOTHING=0.3 FREEZE_EPOCHS=3 MIXUP_ALPHA=0.8 python train.py
trajectory.description: Observation: 5 epochs gave 36.7% test acc, model severely undertrained, ~116s/epoch. Analysis: Need more epochs + noise-robust techniques + speed optimizations. Decision: Add AMP, freeze backbone initially, use higher LR for head, train 20 epochs with cosine schedule.

trajectory.command: PHASE1_EPOCHS=15 PHASE2_EPOCHS=15 BACKBONE_LR=3e-6 HEAD_LR_P2=3e-4 CLEAN_THRESHOLD=0.3 USE_PSEUDO=1 python train_v2.py

Use cleanlab scores to weight samples and relabel noisy ones with model predictions. Decision: Implement clean-subset training for Phase 2 + pseudo-labeling for noisy samples.

Observation: Best test acc 78.47%. Pseudo-labeling didn't help. Mixup too aggressive in Phase 1. Analysis: Need to go back to what worked (iter 4 approach) and improve it. Key: longer Phase 1, gentler Phase 2, better loss. Decision: Rewrite training with ELR loss, longer Phase 1 (20 epochs), Phase 2 with very low backbone LR, no mixup initially. Also try label smoothing CE.

trajectory.description: Observation: Iter 13 trained 40 epochs total, val_acc 60.34%, train_acc 98%. Best test acc 80.8%. Analysis: Heavy overfitting in Phase 2. Need self-distillation approach - use soft labels from best model instead of hard noisy labels. Decision: Submit eval for current checkpoint, then implement self-distillation training.

Observation: 80.87% accuracy (new best, marginal). Phase 2 val_acc ~60.4%, train_acc ~63%. Analysis: Hard pseudo-labels have limited benefit. Need soft label distillation - use full probability distribution from best model as targets with KL divergence. This captures inter-class relationships and is more robust to noise. Decision: Implement self-distillation with soft labels, KL div loss, and submit eval.
